summary: Any authenticated course member can retrieve full quiz question records through the quiz detail API, including answer_json for each mapped question. This exposes correct answers and assessment secrets to students before or during attempts, undermining quiz integrity.

evidence_snippets.reason: The API allows any course member, not just staff, to fetch the full quiz question payload.

evidence_snippets.code:
SELECT qq.quiz_id, qq.question_id, qq.points, qq.position,
       q.qtype, q.prompt, q.options_json, q.answer_json
FROM quiz_questions qq
JOIN quizzes z ON z.quiz_id = qq.quiz_id AND z.course_id = :course_id
JOIN questions q ON q.question_id = qq.question_id AND q.course_id = :course_id
WHERE qq.quiz_id = :quiz_id
evidence_snippets.reason: The repository returns answer_json together with the quiz questions, so the student-visible API response includes the correct answers.

The controller treats quiz question data as broadly member-readable, while only the separate question bank is staff-restricted, indicating an authorization boundary mismatch around assessment secrets.

root_cause: Quiz detail access is authorized for all course members, but the returned data model includes staff-only assessment secrets such as answer_json instead of a student-safe projection.
repair_plan: Split quiz-question retrieval into staff and student representations. For member-visible quiz detail and attempt flows, return only the fields needed to answer the quiz, excluding answer_json and any other solution material. Keep answer_json accessible only to explicitly authorized staff endpoints.
